evals.prompt: 我們接下來會反覆做網站、文案和 SEO 任務，但現在缺一份可重用的 positioning / ICP / core message context。幫我整理成共用文件。
evals.expected_output: Should treat this as a reusable context-document task. It should organize positioning, ICP, and message foundations into a reusable context rather than treating it like a one-off answer.
assertions: Treats the task as a reusable context document

evals.prompt: 我們已有 context 文件，但 target audience 和 value proposition 最近改了，幫我只更新相關段落。
evals.expected_output: Should read and update the existing context selectively rather than regenerating the whole document. It should focus on the requested sections only.
assertions: Focuses only on the requested sections

evals.prompt: 我現在只是想先把 service page 文案寫好，repo 裡其實已經有很多 docs。
evals.expected_output: Should recognize that existing project docs may already be enough for the immediate task. It should avoid forcing a new context-document workflow when the user can proceed directly with the page task.
assertions: Recognizes existing docs may already be sufficient
Avoids forcing a new context workflow
Keeps the immediate page task moving
